files.Fixture_Orbital.asset:
local Object = {
    Identifier = "Fixture_Orbital",
    Parent = "SunEclipJ2000",
    GUI = {
        Name = "Orbital GUI",
        Path = "/ADAM/Fixture Orbital",
    },
    Renderable = {
        Type = "RenderableOrbitalKepler",
        DimInAtmosphere = false,
        Enabled = true,
        Opacity = 0.8,
        RenderBinMode = "Opaque",
        Tag = {"science, fixture"},
        Color = {0.1, 0.2, 0.3},
        Format = "SBDB",
        Path = asset.resource("Fixture_Orbital.csv"),
        SegmentQuality = 42,
        ContiguousMode = true,
        EnableMaxSize = false,
        EnableOutline = true,
        MaxSize = 12.5,
        OutlineColor = {0.4, 0.5, 0.6},
        OutlineWidth = 2.5,
        PointSizeExponent = 1.25,
        Rendering = "PointsTrails",
        RenderSize = 8,
        StartRenderIdx = 1,
        TrailFade = 0.75,
        TrailWidth = 0.33,
    },
}

asset.onInitialize(function ()
  openspace.addSceneGraphNode(Object);
end)
asset.onDeinitialize(function ()
  openspace.removeSceneGraphNode(Object);
end)
